title: tephrosia humilis
intro: Tephrosia humilis, also known as the Dwarf or Small Tephrosia, is a small, shrub-like plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Tephrosia humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
